# CWE-909: Missing Initialization of Resource (mitigated, pure stdlib)
lang: go
file: CWE-909-safe.pure.go
variant: pure-go
---
package sample

import (
	"database/sql"
	"encoding/json"
	"net/http"
)

type Widget struct {
	ID   int    `json:"id"`
	Name string `json:"name"`
}

var widgetDB *sql.DB

// Safe: handler refuses to run when the database has not been initialized.
func ListWidgets(w http.ResponseWriter, r *http.Request) {
	if widgetDB == nil {
		http.Error(w, "service unavailable", http.StatusServiceUnavailable)
		return
	}
	rows, err := widgetDB.Query("SELECT id, name FROM widgets")
	if err != nil {
		http.Error(w, "error", http.StatusInternalServerError)
		return
	}
	defer rows.Close()
	var widgets []Widget
	for rows.Next() {
		var wgt Widget
		_ = rows.Scan(&wgt.ID, &wgt.Name)
		widgets = append(widgets, wgt)
	}
	w.Header().Set("Content-Type", "application/json")
	_ = json.NewEncoder(w).Encode(widgets)
}
